confirm.subject: Confirm your subscription to {siteName}'s writing
confirm.title: Confirm your subscription
intro: Please confirm your email address to start receiving occasional notes when something new is published.
confirm.secondaryActionPrefix: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:

sections.heading: What to expect
paragraphs: This confirmation link expires in 24 hours. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.

welcome.subject: You're subscribed to {siteName}'s writing
welcome.title: You're subscribed
intro: You're all set. {authorName} will send occasional updates when new writing is published.
Expect thoughtful notes on building software, developer tools, and what it takes to turn ideas into products.

sections.heading: A quick note
paragraphs: No spam, no constant drip campaign, and no pressure to stay subscribed if it stops being useful.

writing.subject: New writing: {entryTitle}
writing.preview: A new essay is live on {siteName}.

sections.heading: Why this one is worth your time
paragraphs: If it resonates, the writing archive has more notes on building software, developer tools, and turning ideas into products.

project.subject: New project: {entryTitle}
project.preview: A new project is live on {siteName}.

sections.heading: What shipped
paragraphs: You can explore the project details, links, and implementation notes on the site.
